mapper.insert: insert into emoji(url, content, category_id, sort, creator_id,width,height, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{url}, #{content}, #{categoryId}, #{sort}, #{creatorId},#{width},#{height}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
update emoji
url = #{url},
content = #{content},
category_id = #{categoryId},
update_time = #{updateTime},
status = #{status}
where id = #{id}
update emoji set status = 0 where id = #{id}
